discover(Cards, Cards) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Depending on the enemyCard situation, if it is not opened, it is called by moveE() method.
draw() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Shows the game scenes depending on GameState.
drawCards() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the GameCards with the help of Battleship.drawGameCards(List) Battleship.drawEnemyCards() Battleship.drawHandCards() That is handled by controller with the help of nextFrame()
drawEnemyC(PImage[], int, int, int) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.
drawEnemyCards() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the EnemyCards with the help of Battleship.drawEnemyC(PImage[], int, int, int) This draws cards in 4*3 bloc.
drawGame() - Method in interface battleship.controller.IBattleshipView
Shows the current game state of Battleship.
drawGame() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Shows the current game state of Battleship.
drawGameC(List<Cards>, PImage[], PImage, int, int, int) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.
drawGameCards(List<Cards>) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the GameCards with the help of Battleship.drawGameC(List, PImage[], PImage, int, int, int) This draws cards in 4*3 bloc.
drawGG() - Method in interface battleship.controller.IBattleshipView
Shows the game over screen of Battleship.
drawGG() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Shows the game over screen of Battleship.
drawHandCards() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the HandCards in a line.
drawInfoBox(int, int, int, int, int, int, String, float, int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Draws the info boxes on Game Screen depending on Parameters.
drawTitleScreen() - Method in interface battleship.controller.IBattleshipView
Shows the title screen of Battleship.
drawTitleScreen() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Shows the title screen of Battleship.
